summary: Tested demo mode, onboarding wizard, and empty states. Fixed 3 backend bugs in demo endpoint (reminder_preference, task_status/category, is_in_london field names). All features now working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Demo compliance records used 'reminder_days' instead of 'reminder_preference'
Demo tasks used 'status' instead of 'task_status' and missing 'category' field

passed_tests: Demo mode button on landing page ('Try Demo Mode')
Demo mode creates account and redirects to dashboard
Demo banner shows 'You're exploring Demo Mode' with purple gradient
Demo banner has 'Start Free Trial' button
Dashboard shows 3 properties, 2 expiring soon, 2 overdue, 6 tasks
Onboarding wizard appears after signup for new users
Onboarding wizard shows 3 steps with progress bar (0 of 3 complete)
Onboarding wizard skip button (X) closes wizard
Onboarding wizard 'Skip for now' link works
Empty state dashboard shows 'Welcome to Staylet!' with featured styling
Empty state dashboard has tip about 15 minutes setup
Empty state properties shows 'Add your first property' with featured styling
Empty state properties has tip about UK nations (England, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland)
Seed data: Victoria Terrace Apartment (England, SW1V 1AA)
Seed data: Edinburgh Old Town Flat (Scotland, EH1 1QS)
Seed data: Mixed compliance statuses (compliant, expiring_soon, overdue)
Seed data: Gas Safety, EICR, EPC, Insurance records
Seed data: 6 tasks with varied priorities and due dates

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary account automatically

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates 3 UK properties, 12 compliance records, 6 tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo mode, onboarding wizard, and empty states all working. Demo creates realistic UK property data with mixed compliance statuses. Onboarding wizard shows for new signups but not for demo users (onboarding_completed=True for demo).

demo_mode_button.details: Landing page hero has 'Try Demo Mode' button that creates demo account

demo_banner.details: Purple gradient banner shows 'You're exploring Demo Mode' with 'Start Free Trial' button

onboarding_wizard.details: 3-step wizard appears after signup, shows progress bar, skip functionality works

empty_state_dashboard.details: Featured variant with 'Welcome to Staylet!' and tip about 15 minutes setup

empty_state_properties.details: Featured variant with 'Add your first property' and tip about UK nations

seed_data_properties.details: 3 realistic UK properties: Victoria Terrace, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh Old Town

seed_data_compliance.details: 12 records with mixed statuses: 2 overdue, 2 expiring soon, 8 compliant

seed_data_tasks.details: 6 tasks with varied priorities and due dates
